flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 37 pp at Fortis College-Orange Park vs the 2003–2007 baseline (35.2% vs 72.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Fortis College-Orange Park vs the 2018–2022 baseline (327 vs 429).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Fortis College-Orange Park are 16% below 6-year earnings ($34.0k → $28.5k).
